status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Landing page
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can visit the root URL and see a marketing landing page with hero, features, stats, and CTA.
verification: Verify features section (6 feature cards) displays
evidence: Visual verification: Landing page renders without errors
features.notes: Implemented with responsive design, dark mode support

features.title: Dashboard shell with sidebar navigation
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can access /dashboard and see a responsive sidebar with navigation groups, top header with search/notifications/avatar, and main content area.
verification: Verify sidebar displays with 3 navigation groups (Main Menu, Finance, Management)
Verify top header displays with search bar, notification bell, user avatar dropdown
Verify sidebar is responsive (collapses on mobile)
Click navigation items and verify routing works
evidence: Navigation structure defined with 10 menu items
features.notes: Uses shadcn sidebar components, mobile-responsive with Sheet component

features.title: Dashboard homepage with stats and tables
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can view the main dashboard page showing revenue stats, order counts, recent orders table, and top products list.
verification: Verify 4 stat cards display (Total Revenue, Total Orders, Products Sold, Profit Margin)
Verify Recent Orders table shows 5 mock orders with status badges
Verify Top Products list shows 5 products with growth indicators
features.notes: Enhanced UI with hover effects, gradients, dark mode support

features.title: Sales page (Penjualan)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Sales page and see revenue stats, invoices table with search/filter, and recent activity feed.
verification: Verify invoices table with search functionality
Verify status filter works (Lunas, Tertunda, Diproses, Dibatalkan)

features.title: Purchasing page (Pembelian)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Purchasing page and see procurement stats, purchase orders table with status/ETA, and top suppliers list.
verification: Verify Purchase Orders table shows orders with status badges and ETA
Verify Top Suppliers list with satisfaction ratings
features.notes: Status labels: Diterima, Dikirim, Diproses, Tertunda

features.title: Inventory page (Inventaris)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Inventory page and see stock stats, product list with search/filter, stock level progress bars, and categories sidebar.
verification: Verify stock list table with search functionality
Verify stock level progress bars display correctly
evidence: Stock status badges: Aman, Menipis, Kritis
features.notes: Most complex page with search, filter, and categories

features.title: Accounting page (Akuntansi)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Accounting page and see financial data, journal entries, and account balances.
verification: Verify accounting-specific stats display (4 stat cards)
Verify journal entries table with 8 entries displays
Verify Chart of Accounts sidebar displays with 8 account balances
evidence: Mock data: 8 journal entries (Posted/Pending/Draft), 8 account balances
features.notes: Implements same pattern as inventaris page: 4 stat cards, journal entries table with debit/credit columns and status filter, chart of accounts sidebar with balance changes.

features.title: Financial Reports page (Laporan)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Financial Reports page and see report types, generate reports, and view financial summaries.
verification: Verify report preview or generation functionality works
features.notes: Route defined in sidebar but page not implemented

features.title: Employees page (Karyawan)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Employees page and see employee list, departments, and HR stats.
features.notes: Route defined in sidebar but page not implemented

features.title: Assets page (Aset)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Assets page and see company assets, depreciation tracking, and asset categories.
verification: Verify asset value and depreciation data displays
features.notes: Route defined in sidebar but page not implemented

features.title: Analytics page
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Analytics page and see business metrics, charts, and trend analysis.
verification: Verify charts display (revenue trends, product performance, etc.)
features.notes: Route defined in sidebar but page not implemented

features.title: Settings page (Pengaturan)
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can navigate to Settings page and configure app preferences, user profile, and system settings.
verification: Verify settings can be modified and saved
features.notes: Route defined in sidebar footer but page not implemented

features.title: Test infrastructure setup
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers can run automated tests to verify application functionality.
verification: Install a test framework (vitest or jest)
Run npm test and verify it executes without errors
Add at least one smoke test that verifies the app builds
features.notes: Currently no test framework configured. init.sh calls npm test which fails.

features.title: Git repository initialization
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers can track changes, create branches, and collaborate using version control.
verification: Create a feature branch and verify git branch lists it
features.notes: Project is not yet a git repository
